title: 'Achiythophel #0302
definition:
Ahithophel = "my brother is foolish (folly)"

 1) a counsellor of David, grandfather of Bathsheba
    (cf \\#2Sa 11:3, 23:34\\), who joined Absalom in revolt against
    David, and committed suicide when Absalom did not heed his counsel
